title: How it works
subtitle: Follow the steps, master the skills, and compete with developers worldwide. Your interview journey starts here.

steps.title: Arm yourself with theory
steps.description: Knowledge base is your library. Read topic breakdowns, explore code examples, and build your foundation before the battle

steps.title: Train with widgets
steps.description: Solve interactive challenges, sharpen your skills, and earn your first points. Every correct answer = +XP

steps.title: Face the AI interviewer
steps.description: Test yourself in a real interview format. The AI asks questions — no mercy, no shortcuts

steps.title: Break into the leaderboard
steps.description: Compete with thousands of developers worldwide. The more points you earn, the higher you climb. Become #1
